# Wesley Hopkins
Digital Visibility Architect | SEO & GEO Specialist
https://wesleyhopkins.vercel.app

## Summary
Wesley Hopkins is a specialist in search and generative engine optimization, bridging the gap between human rhetoric and machine understanding. [cite: 1, 4]

## Professional Experience
- Project Manager, Reputation Defense Network (2023 - Present): Manages online reputation campaigns and SEO-oriented content. 
- Technical Editor, J.J. Keller & Associates (2022): Developed technical copy for OSHA guidelines. [cite: 37, 38]
- Professional Blogger (2017 - Present): Writing SEO-oriented content for health, legal, and home improvement industries. [cite: 39, 40]

## Education
- Master of Arts in English: Rhetoric and Composition, University of North Alabama (2021). [cite: 4, 5]
- Bachelor of Science in Professional Writing, University of North Alabama (2019). [cite: 6, 7]
- Minor: Human-Computer Interactions and User Experience (HCI-UX). [cite: 8]

## Certifications & Research
- HubSpot Academy SEO Certified (2026).
- NASA L'SPACE Proposal Writing and Evaluation Experience (2021). [cite: 9, 10]
- Adams Norbin Research Scholar (2020 - 2021). [cite: 12]
